title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Law, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Big Mom, Kaido as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd bet my life the upper one leads to Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Whoa, hold on! Be a little more careful!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "You're not in any position to be picky here! Some "great idea" you had-you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just saw a strange shadow in the sea.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hm? Wait a minute! You! Come to think of it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Marco said he knew where to find 120, so we made a pitstop to pick him up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Rko....!! What a splendid Samural You've become!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Big Mom still hasn't shown up!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah! It just so happens that she's on her way here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Then say something sooner, bad HUANG!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll make the announcement alongside the kid's execU- TION!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: UWAGH! y'know, I know he's on our side...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: But when the boss suddenly shows up...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The mood gets so heavy! It's like that stage is a gate to hell!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm gonna spice up this lame execution...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen up! This is the new onigashima initiative!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: One day, I went to my dad...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And said, "I want to be Kozuki Oden!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He beat the hell out of me for it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What does any of that have to do with me!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 20 years ago, I was there! I saw it! The legendary "hour- long execution"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: There's never been another samural like him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and Orochi and my own dad killed him! It was so frustrated- ing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but more than that, I felt an inferno in my chest...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the streams of my my my mystery tears were like rivers!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After that, I found Oden's logbook in Kuri, and it's been my Bible ever since!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OROCHI AND DAD HAVE NO IDEA THIS BOOK EXISTS!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It talks about his heroic life and the things he held dear!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With the Red Scabbards dead, someone has to carry on Oden's will!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 64 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
